Operation 'TemplatesList' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary 'Load Templates' is too generic and lacks action clarity. Description is incomplete - it doesn't explain what parameters are available (the operation has 3 parameters), what the response structure contains, or how pagination/filtering works. Enhanced version specifies the operation retrieves templates with filtering/sorting support, clarifies the response format, and maintains the access level requirement. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Returns a list of your templates. Required Access Level: ViewTemplates
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all email templates in your account. Supports filtering and sorting options via query parameters. Returns an array of template objects containing template metadata, content, and configuration. Requires ViewTemplates access level.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Load Templates' is too generic and lacks action clarity. Description is incomplete - it doesn't explain what parameters are available (the operation has 3 parameters), what the response structure contains, or how pagination/filtering works. Enhanced version specifies the operation retrieves templates with filtering/sorting support, clarifies the response format, and maintains the access level requirement. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'ContactsList' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Load Contacts' is too generic. Description lacks details about pagination, filtering capabilities, and response structure. Added specifics about parameters, return format, and what data is included to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns a list of contacts. Required Access Level: ViewContacts
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all contacts in your account. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. Returns an array of Contact objects with email, name, status, and custom field data. Required Access Level: ViewContacts.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Load Contacts' is too generic. Description lacks details about pagination, filtering capabilities, and response structure. Added specifics about parameters, return format, and what data is included to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'ContactsPost' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate, but description needs clarification on return values, duplicate handling, and list assignment behavior. Added details about response format and error handling to help AI agents understand the operation's effects.

data.current_description: Add new Contacts to your Lists. Up to 1000 can be added (for more import CSV). Required Access Level: ModifyContacts
data.description_suggestion: Adds one or more new contacts to your account and optionally assigns them to lists. Supports batch operations with a maximum of 1000 contacts per request. For larger imports, use CSV import. Returns the created Contact objects with assigned IDs. Duplicate emails are rejected. Required Access Level: ModifyContacts.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description needs clarification on return values, duplicate handling, and list assignment behavior. Added details about response format and error handling to help AI agents understand the operation's effects.

message: Operation 'ContactsByEmailDelete' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear, but description lacks information about return value and clarification that deletion is irreversible. Added details about response format and email reusability to help AI agents understand the operation's permanent effects.

data.current_description: Permanently deletes the contact from all your lists. Required Access Level: ModifyContacts
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a contact identified by email address from all lists and your account. This action cannot be undone. The contact's email becomes available for re-addition. Returns a success confirmation. Required Access Level: ModifyContacts.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear, but description lacks information about return value and clarification that deletion is irreversible. Added details about response format and email reusability to help AI agents understand the operation's permanent effects.

message: Operation 'ListsList' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary 'Load Lists' is too generic. Description lacks details about response structure and available list metadata. Added specifics about return format and list properties to improve AI agent understanding of what data is available.

data.current_description: Returns all your existing lists. Required Access Level: ViewContacts
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all mailing lists in your account with optional pagination and sorting. Returns an array of ContactList objects containing list ID, name, creation date, and subscriber count. Required Access Level: ViewContacts.
data.reasoning: Summary 'Load Lists' is too generic. Description lacks details about response structure and available list metadata. Added specifics about return format and list properties to improve AI agent understanding of what data is available.

message: Operation 'ListsPost' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic. Description lacks input requirements and response details. Added specifics about request schema, return format, and initial state to help AI agents understand what to provide and what to expect.

data.current_description: Add a new list. Required Access Level: ModifyContacts
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new mailing list in your account. Accepts a ListPayload with list name and optional description. Returns the created ContactList object with assigned list ID, creation timestamp, and initial subscriber count (0). Required Access Level: ModifyContacts.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks input requirements and response details. Added specifics about request schema, return format, and initial state to help AI agents understand what to provide and what to expect.

message: Operation 'StatisticsGet' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary 'Load Statistics' is too vague. Description lacks context about what statistics are available and what filters are supported. data.current_description: Returns basic statistics. Required Access Level: ViewReports
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aggregated email campaign statistics including sends, opens, clicks, bounces, and unsubscribes. Supports filtering by date range and campaign via query parameters. Returns a LogSummary object with detailed metrics and engagement rates. Required Access Level: ViewReports.
data.reasoning: Summary 'Load Statistics' is too vague. Description lacks context about what statistics are available and what filters are supported. message: Operation 'EmailsSend' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about inputs (what email data is needed), outputs (what is returned), and actionability. Added specifics about recipient handling, content requirements, and response details for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Prepare and send email. It's not needed to maintain your own SMTP server. Just provide us your email data and we'll take care of the rest.
data.description_suggestion: Sends an email message to specified recipients. Accepts email content including subject, body, and recipient information. The API handles SMTP delivery, so no local mail server is required. Returns a confirmation with message ID and delivery status.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about inputs (what email data is needed), outputs (what is returned), and actionability. Added specifics about recipient handling, content requirements, and response details for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'EmailsTransactionalSend' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is misleading - 'bulk' suggests marketing emails, but this is for transactional emails. Description lacks input details (template vs. custom content options), recipient handling, and output information. Improved to clarify transactional purpose and provide complete input/output context.

data.current_description: Send transactional emails in bulk using a template or supplied content.
data.description_suggestion: Sends transactional emails in bulk to multiple recipients using either a predefined template or custom-supplied content. Accepts recipient list and template ID or inline email content. Returns delivery confirmation with message IDs and status for each recipient.
data.reasoning: Summary is misleading - 'bulk' suggests marketing emails, but this is for transactional emails. Description lacks input details (template vs. custom content options), recipient handling, and output information. Improved to clarify transactional purpose and provide complete input/output context.

data.current_description: Returns a list of all your campaigns. Required Access Level: ViewCampaigns

data.reasoning: Summary 'Load Campaigns' is vague and not action-oriented. Description lacks output details about what campaign information is returned and doesn't mention pagination/filtering support. Enhanced to clarify return structure and available query options for AI agents.

data.current_description: Updates a previously added campaign. Required Access Level: ModifyCampaigns
